subject: [RFC PATCH 3/9 v2] mm/memcontrol: Refactor page_counter charging in try_charge_memcg

2026-04-23.patch_summary: This patch refactors the page_counter charging in try_charge_memcg to make it easier to roll back partial charges when any one of the three page_counters fails to charge. The code is modified to handle different scenarios where memsw or memory counters fail to charge, allowing for more flexible and efficient handling of charging and uncharging operations.
